prompt: Generate a chart depicting multiple trend lines over time, similar to the data display in image 1, but visually rendered with the antique, hand-drawn lines and shaded areas characteristic of the style in image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate a line chart depicting multiple distinct trend lines over time, similar in data structure and display to image 1. The visual presentation should adopt the antique, hand-drawn aesthetic found in image 2. Specifically, the chart should feature slightly imperfect, hand-sketched lines, and include prominent shaded areas between various trend lines or between lines and the X-axis, consistent with the style of the 'BALANCE' regions in image 2. These shaded regions should utilize a muted, vintage color palette and may incorporate integrated textual labels, as demonstrated in image 2.
objects: Prominent shaded areas between trend lines or between lines and the X-axis
Muted, vintage color palette for shaded regions
Integrated textual labels within shaded regions
